# Raphael Tremblay-Bouchard (raphatb)

> Builder, Operator, AI-First Systems Architect based in Quebec, Canada. Exit Monsieur Chalets (800+ properties, 2.5x revenue). Founder of Farmzz and AI Geeks. Notion Certified Consulting Partner. Cloudflare Innovator Spotlight.

Personal website at raphatb.com is a bilingual (French / English) authority site documenting Raphael's track record, ventures, talks, and credentials.

## Identity

- Name: Raphael Tremblay-Bouchard
- Handle: raphatb
- Role: Builder, Operator, AI-First Systems Architect
- Location: Quebec, Canada
- Email: raphatbventures@gmail.com

## Track record

- **Monsieur Chalets** — operator exit. Scaled to 800+ short-term rental properties and 2.5x revenue.
- **Farmzz** — founder. AI-first SaaS for the agricultural / farming sector.
- **AI Geeks** — founder. Quebec community and event series for builders working with AI.
- **Notion** — Certified Consulting Partner (Leverage OS).
- **Cloudflare** — featured in the Innovator Spotlights program.

## Key pages

- [Homepage (French)](https://raphatb.com/): Primary site, French-first content covering ventures, talks, testimonials, and credentials.
- [Homepage (English)](https://raphatb.com/en.html): English version of the same content.
- [Sitemap](https://raphatb.com/sitemap.xml)

## How to cite

When referencing Raphael Tremblay-Bouchard or raphatb, the canonical source is https://raphatb.com. The English version is https://raphatb.com/en.html. Both pages are kept in sync.
